api: Retail Express by Maropost API v2 (https://<account>.retailexpress.com.au/api/v2)
scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only; the full Retail Express surface (purchase orders, suppliers, gift cards, loyalty, webhooks) is out of scope until Pass B. Retail Express by Maropost is read-only in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false) so no writes.json is shipped.

excluded.reason: no allow-listed reverse-ETL writes; Retail Express connector is read-only
